ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department or program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department or program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Text describing the admission requirements for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admissions cycle */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the admissions cycle */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term of the admissions cycle (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the admissions cycle */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the admissions cycle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admissions cycle was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admissions cycle was last updated */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Date by which applications must be submitted */,
  "offer_deadline" TEXT /* Date by which offers must be accepted */,
  "enrollment_deadline" TEXT /* Date by which students must confirm their enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application record */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admissions cycle */,
  "appl_count" INTEGER /* Number of applications received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application record was last updated */,
  "application_fee_paid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the application fee has been paid */,
  "application_fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the application fee */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., undergraduate, graduate, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES admissions_cycles ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer record */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application record */,
  "offers_count" INTEGER /* Number of offers made */,
  "offer_rate" REAL /* Offer rate as a percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the offer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the offer record was last updated */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date when the offer was made */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of offer (e.g., conditional, unconditional) */,
  "offer_conditions" TEXT /* Text describing any conditions attached to the offer */,
  "offer_accepted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the offer was accepted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the offer record */,
  "enroll_count" INTEGER /* Number of students who enrolled */,
  "enroll_rate" REAL /* Enrollment rate as a percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment record was last updated */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student confirmed enrollment */,
  "tuition_fee_paid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tuition fee has been paid */,
  "tuition_fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the tuition fee */,
  "financial_aid_applied" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the student applied for financial aid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES offers ("offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., applied, offered, enrolled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Name of the high school or previous institution */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average from the previous institution */,
  "sat_score" INTEGER /* SAT score */,
  "act_score" INTEGER /* ACT score */,
  "extracurricular_activities" TEXT /* Text describing any extracurricular activities */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Text describing any awards or honors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_details" (
  "app_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application detail record */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admissions cycle */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., submitted, reviewed, accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application detail record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application detail record was last updated */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method by which the application was submitted (e.g., online, mail) */,
  "application_source" TEXT /* Source of the application (e.g., university website, partner institution) */,
  "application_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_details_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_details_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_details_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES admissions_cycles ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_details_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
